name: Peppol BIS (EU) e-Invoicing
description: EU Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 (UBL 2.1 + EN 16931) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Generates real UBL 2.1 invoice XML and transmits it (unsigned — the Access Point seals transport-level) to a tenant-configured Peppol Access Point. No mock fallback: noop when no Access Point is configured, error surfaced when the Access Point call fails.

settings.label: Peppol Access Point URL
settings.help: HTTP endpoint of your Peppol Access Point that accepts the UBL invoice and wraps it in an AS4 envelope. Leave empty to disable transmission (submit returns noop).

settings.label: Peppol Endpoint ID
settings.help: Your Peppol participant id used as the supplier EndpointID, e.g. 0088:7300010000001. Required together with the Access Point URL for the adapter to be considered configured.

settings.label: Peppol Document Type ID
settings.help: Optional CustomizationID override for the UBL document type. Defaults to the Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 customization.

secrets.label: Access Point Bearer Token
secrets.help: Optional bearer token for the Access Point; injected host-side into the Authorization header, never seen by the plugin.
